bug.description: HARQ process error such as incorrect retransmission or wrong redundancy version

prompt:
There is a HARQ process error such as incorrect retransmission or wrong redundancy version downstream of function measurcmd_display_macstats_ue in the common/utils/telnetsrv subsystem.
The function is located at common/utils/telnetsrv/telnetsrv_enb_measurements.c:114.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
